executive_summary.conclusion: The active data path did not fail.
executive_summary.detail: Active MD2 data-flow QA and live fixture mapping QA are green; all 24 MD1 final fixtures are included and mapped safely.

executive_summary.conclusion: The score model was globally low on MD1 goals and weak on result calibration.
executive_summary.detail: Average predicted total goals were 2.461; actual MD1 average was 3.125; result accuracy was 10/24.

executive_summary.conclusion: Player role/start evidence is the largest rebuild blocker, not identity mapping.
executive_summary.detail: 7 possible role/start flags are detected from high-start/no-points-row or low-start/positive-points evidence; direct matchStatus start/sub evidence is unavailable in the current live feed.

executive_summary.conclusion: Recommendation failures are model failures around role, fixture environment, and value/captain weighting.
executive_summary.detail: The recommendation audit shows flat/miss/no-actual-row outcomes by mode; no stale legacy public data path is used.

executive_summary.conclusion: Team Builder cannot be fully audited without a saved squad artifact.
executive_summary.detail: No saved/generated Balanced Squad output was found; the current audit is limited to active builder inputs and recommendation/finance signals.

score_model_failure.pele_prior_assessment: MD1 indicates a PELE-anchored prior that needs shrinkage-calibrated goal-environment and team residual updates; one matchday is not enough to declare the PELE prior structurally wrong.

recommendation_failure.captain_candidates_assessment: Captain rows are auditable, but captain quality needs stronger actual-upside and role evidence checks before MD2 promotion.

team_builder_md1_audit.scope_note: No saved/generated Team Builder squad artifact was found in data/. This audit uses active MD1 recommendation, projection, and finance inputs only.

omitted_captain_score_top20.name: Vinícius José Paixão de Oliveira Júnior

team_builder_md1_audit.conclusion: A hard Team Builder output audit is not possible without a saved/generated squad artifact. The input audit still shows whether value/finance-driven candidates underperformed and which elite/upside rows were omitted.

model_rebuild_guidance.recommendation: Raise the global goal baseline with shrinkage toward the pre-MD1 prior; do not apply the full MD1 ratio unshrunk.
model_rebuild_guidance.robustness: likely robust, but exact multiplier could overfit one matchday
model_rebuild_guidance.evidence: MD1 actual avg goals 3.125 vs predicted 2.461; ratio 1.27.

model_rebuild_guidance.recommendation: Add a calibrated upset/draw uncertainty layer for medium favorites and high-uncertainty team contexts.
model_rebuild_guidance.evidence: Predicted/final result accuracy was 10/24; favorite wins were 10/24.

model_rebuild_guidance.recommendation: Shrink clean-sheet probabilities for public defensive context until MD1 residuals are incorporated.
Use completed MD1 point-row presence and matchStatus when available as a strong live role signal for MD2.
model_rebuild_guidance.evidence: 753 players have completed MD1 point rows; 7 high-start/no-row or low-start/positive-row role flags.

model_rebuild_guidance.recommendation: Gate component projections by live role evidence before applying event-rate upside.
model_rebuild_guidance.evidence: Player mean absolute projection error was 2.319; missing point rows dominate hard role evidence gaps.

model_rebuild_guidance.recommendation: Review position-level component priors against MD1 actual errors before rerunning MD2.
model_rebuild_guidance.robustness: some risk of overfitting one matchday
model_rebuild_guidance.evidence: Position-level MD1 error tables are included in the dataset summary.

model_rebuild_guidance.recommendation: Add a value/finance guardrail: cheap or high-finance-alpha candidates need confirmed role evidence or a stronger raw projection.
model_rebuild_guidance.evidence: 26 value/finance-driven recommendation rows were flat, misses, or had no actual row.

model_rebuild_guidance.recommendation: Add explicit elite/high-upside exposure checks for public picks and captain lists.
model_rebuild_guidance.robustness: likely robust as a QA guardrail, exact thresholds need tuning
model_rebuild_guidance.evidence: 20 top actual MD1 performers were outside the MD1 recommendation surface.

model_rebuild_guidance.recommendation: Cap value filler exposure in Balanced Squad unless MD1 role evidence, start probability, and expected minutes all clear stricter thresholds.
model_rebuild_guidance.evidence: No saved builder squad artifact exists, but active inputs show value/finance rows need live role gating before squad optimization.

model_rebuild_guidance.recommendation: Publish model notes that distinguish data-path health from model calibration misses and show MD1 backtest tables before MD2 promotion.
model_rebuild_guidance.evidence: Active data path, fixture mapping, and official identity are green; the failures are model calibration and role-estimation issues.

top_10_actionable_md2_fixes: Recalibrate the score model goal environment upward, but shrink the full MD1 1.27x raw ratio to avoid overfitting one matchday.
Add a specific underdog/upset uncertainty layer for close or medium-favorite fixtures; MD1 result accuracy was only 10/24.
Do not let clean-sheet context dominate defender/keeper recommendations after MD1; high-probability clean sheets missed often.
Treat missing MD1 actual-points rows for high-start players as a role/start warning before MD2 projections.
Increase weight on completed MD1 live points and point-row presence for start/minutes model v2, while separating it from ownership-only drift.
Add team-specific attack/defense residual priors with shrinkage for extreme MD1 misses such as Germany attack and Spain finishing volatility.
Add recommendation penalties for high finance-alpha or value candidates with no MD1 points row or weak role evidence.
Strengthen captain shortlist exposure to elite/high-upside actual performers, not only price-adjusted value.
Require public pick QA to show actual MD1 backtest by mode before promoting MD2 recommendations.
For Team Builder v4, cap low-price/value fill-ins unless role evidence or MD1 points row confirms they are playable.

checks.detail: Only complete/final, safe-to-display MD1 fixtures are included.
All fixture actuals come from round_id=1.
Sources are current fantasy-pool and live support files only; legacy files are not read by this script.
confirmed_final_squad_rows=0; final squads are not claimed source-backed.
No NaN or Infinity values found.
